name: KeyCDN
description: KeyCDN content delivery network for fast and secure asset distribution

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to KeyCDN
2. Go to Account → API
3. Copy your API Key
4. Paste it below

Note: The API key is used with HTTP Basic Auth (pass 'api_key_here' as both username and empty password)

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists KeyCDN zones to verify CDN access is managed
